name: Jinzai Food Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Jinzai Food Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research, manufacture, and sale of fish and tofu products under the Jinzai and Boweiyuan brand names. The company was formerly known as Huawen Food Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jinzai Food Group Co., Ltd. in April 2021. Jinzai Food Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Yueyang, China.
